reviews.comment:
Me atendió una playera muy antipática. Le tuve que pedir que me repase el vidrio y lo hizo de mala gana. Se equivocó de trabajo me parece si no tiene voluntad de servicio….

(Translated by Google)
I was served by a very unfriendly woman. I had to ask her to clean the windshield, and she did it reluctantly. It seems to me she chose the wrong job if she has no desire to serve.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4834150439448216609/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNHaVlDcmRBEAE

reviews.comment:
Muy buen servicio. Amplia para maniobrar, cargar combustible, inflar ruedas. Tiene un comercio multirrubro para comprar alimentos y bebidas.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service. Spacious enough for maneuvering, refueling, and inflating tires. It also has a convenience store for buying food and drinks.

reviews.comment:

Paracen empleados publicos.
Los de seguridad no tienen buen trato.
Te hacen sentir que te estan regalando lo que consumis.

They need updating. The employees...
